title: Summary: Turn 28
content: Pueblo is a CLI-first + Electron desktop code agent framework written in TypeScript (Node.js 22 LTS). Core architecture: input routing → command dispatch / agent execution → provider adapters (GitHub Copilot, DeepSeek) → tool calls (exec/glob/grep/read) → SQLite persistence (better-sqlite3) with Pepe semantic memory system (embeddings + retrieval).
